  "text": "The Kafka Connect plugin/extension loading system is implemented primarily in the `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/` package of `sg-evals/kafka--0753c489`.\n\n## PluginClassLoader\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoader.java`: A `URLClassLoader` subclass that provides isolation for each plugin. Each plugin location gets its own `PluginClassLoader` instance.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoaderFactory.java`: Interface for creating `PluginClassLoader` instances (allows mocking in tests).\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ClassLoaderFactory.java`: Default implementation of `PluginClassLoaderFactory`.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java`: Parent classloader that delegates to child `PluginClassLoader` instances. Exposes `pluginClassLoader()` to retrieve the appropriate loader for a given plugin name and version range.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/LoaderSwap.java`: AutoCloseable that swaps the thread context classloader for plugin execution.\n\n## Plugin Scanning via Reflection\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanner.java`: Abstract base class for plugin scanners.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ReflectionScanner.java`: Legacy scanner using ClassGraph (reflection) to discover all subclasses of `SinkConnector`, `SourceConnector`, `Converter`, `HeaderConverter`, `Transformation`, `Predicate`, `ConfigProvider`, `ConnectRestExtension`, and `ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy`.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java`: Modern scanner using `java.util.ServiceLoader` to discover plugins via `META-INF/services/` manifests.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanResult.java`: Aggregated result of a plugin scan.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginSource.java`: Represents a source of plugins (classpath or isolated jar directory).\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginUtils.java`: Utilities for constructing `PluginSource` objects, building classpath URLs for plugin directories, and filtering class names.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDesc.java`: Metadata descriptor for a discovered plugin (class, version, location, classloader).\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginType.java`: Enum of plugin types (SINK, SOURCE, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, etc.).\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java`: Enum controlling discovery mode (ONLY_SCAN, HYBRID_WARN, HYBRID_FAIL, SERVICE_LOAD).\n\n## Interface-based Dependency Injection\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/Plugins.java`: Central class orchestrating plugin loading—runs scanners, installs discovered plugins into the `DelegatingClassLoader`, and provides `newPlugin()` factory methods.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java`: Provides config recommendations using discovered plugin classes.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/VersionedPluginLoadingException.java`: Exception for versioned plugin loading failures.\n\n## Plugin Interfaces (connect/api)\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java`: Base abstract class for all connectors.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java`: Interface/abstract class for sink connectors.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java`: Interface/abstract class for source connectors.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java`: Interface for key/value converters (serialization/deserialization).\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java`: Interface for header converters.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java`: Interface for single-message transformations.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java`: Interface for connector client config override policies."
}

  "text": "The Kafka Connect plugin/extension loading system in sg-evals/kafka--0753c489 is organized around three layers:\n\n## 1. PluginClassLoader (Isolation Layer)\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoader.java`: URLClassLoader subclass that provides classloader isolation for each plugin directory/jar. Each plugin location gets its own instance with child-first delegation.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginClassLoaderFactory.java`: Factory interface for creating PluginClassLoader instances (enables mocking in tests).\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ClassLoaderFactory.java`: Default implementation of PluginClassLoaderFactory.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/DelegatingClassLoader.java`: Parent classloader that maintains a registry of all PluginClassLoaders. Provides `pluginClassLoader(name, range, connectorLoader)` to resolve the correct loader for a plugin, and `installDiscoveredPlugins(scanResult)` to register newly scanned plugins.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/LoaderSwap.java`: AutoCloseable that temporarily swaps the thread context classloader to the plugin's classloader during plugin method invocation.\n\n## 2. Plugin Scanning via Reflection\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanner.java`: Abstract base defining the plugin scanning contract.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ReflectionScanner.java`: Legacy scanner using ClassGraph library to reflectively find all concrete classes that extend SinkConnector, SourceConnector, Converter, HeaderConverter, Transformation, Predicate, ConfigProvider, ConnectRestExtension, or ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/ServiceLoaderScanner.java`: Modern scanner using java.util.ServiceLoader (META-INF/services manifests) per KIP-898.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginScanResult.java`: Container for scan results grouped by plugin type.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginSource.java`: Represents a plugin source (classpath or isolated plugin directory) with associated classloader and URLs.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginUtils.java`: Utilities for building PluginSource objects, resolving plugin paths, and filtering class names (e.g., shouldLoadInIsolation).\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDesc.java`: Descriptor for a discovered plugin holding class, version, location, and classloader.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginType.java`: Enum of plugin types (SINK, SOURCE, CONVERTER, HEADER_CONVERTER, TRANSFORMATION, PREDICATE, CONFIGPROVIDER, REST_EXTENSION, CONNECTOR_CLIENT_CONFIG_OVERRIDE_POLICY).\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginDiscoveryMode.java`: Enum controlling discovery strategy (ONLY_SCAN, HYBRID_WARN, HYBRID_FAIL, SERVICE_LOAD).\n\n## 3. Interface-based Dependency Injection\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/Plugins.java`: The central facade. Orchestrates scanning via ReflectionScanner and ServiceLoaderScanner, installs results into DelegatingClassLoader, and provides typed newPlugin() factory methods that instantiate plugins under the correct classloader context.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/PluginsRecommenders.java`: Provides config value recommendations using discovered plugin class lists.\n- `connect/runtime/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/runtime/isolation/VersionedPluginLoadingException.java`: Exception for versioned plugin resolution failures.\n\n## Plugin Interface Definitions (connect/api)\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/Connector.java`: Base abstract class for all connectors.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/sink/SinkConnector.java`: Abstract base class for sink connectors.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/source/SourceConnector.java`: Abstract base class for source connectors.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/Converter.java`: Interface for key/value serialization (Converter plugins).\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/storage/HeaderConverter.java`: Interface for header serialization (HeaderConverter plugins); discoverable via ServiceLoader.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/transforms/Transformation.java`: Interface for single-message transformations.\n- `connect/api/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/connector/policy/ConnectorClientConfigOverridePolicy.java`: Interface for connector client config override policies."

## Kafka Connect Plugin Architecture

The plugin loading system lives in `sg-evals/kafka--0753c489` under two main areas:

### `connect/runtime/.../isolation/` — Core plugin loading machinery
| File | Role |
|------|------|

| `ServiceLoaderScanner.java` | Modern scanner using `ServiceLoader` (META-INF/services) per KIP-898 |

### `connect/api/.../` — Plugin interfaces
| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `connector/Connector.java` | Base abstract class for all connectors |
| `sink/SinkConnector.java` | Sink connector interface |

| `storage/Converter.java` | Key/value serialization interface |
